name: Chicken and Mushrooms in Sherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 6 Whole chicken breasts, skinned, boned, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add chicken; stir until the chicken is no longer pink.
3. Remove chicken with a slotted spoon.
4. Add onion and garlic; cook until tender.
5. Stir in flour, salt, and lemon pepper seasoning; mix well.
6. Gradually add sherry, chicken broth, lemon juice, and bay leaves.
7. Cook over medium heat for about 3 minutes or until thickened.
8. Add chicken and mushrooms; simmer for 5 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
9. Remove bay leaves. Yield: 24 (1/2 cup) servings.
